title: Multiple Myeloma Disease Map Template v0

uncertainty.summary: Template only; records must be source-checked before reuse.
known_unknowns: Which source-specific extraction rules should be required for the first machine-readable open research map.
Which fields should remain map-level rather than target-, therapy-, or trial-record-level.

limitations: This template does not prove any target, therapy, trial, or open question is clinically actionable.
This template must not be filled with patient-specific features, candidate options, or private case facts.

facts.statement: A public disease map record must state disease and subtype scope before linking claims, sources, or tasks.
facts.uncertainty: This is a schema-planning fact, not a biomedical assertion about a patient.
limitations: Disease scope does not establish patient relevance or treatment direction.

open_questions.question: Which source-specific extraction rules are needed before a machine-readable myeloma open research map can compare target, therapy, trial, regulatory, and dataset coverage?
open_questions.uncertainty: The public map schema is ready, but extraction requirements remain future work.
limitations: An open question does not rank evidence strength or clinical importance.

target_records.label: BCMA target record template
target_records.uncertainty: A target record can describe public target context, but it cannot establish targetability or clinical actionability by itself.

therapy_records.label: CAR T-cell therapy class record template
therapy_records.uncertainty: A therapy class record is for map organization and source linkage only.

trial_records.label: Myeloma trial landscape record template
trial_records.uncertainty: Registry records can support landscape review, but they cannot establish eligibility, availability, or appropriateness.

review_notes: Template validates the disease-map schema shape without creating a generated map.
No real case data, patient identifiers, candidate options, or clinical guidance are included.
